title: crepidium lamii
intro: Crepidium lamii, also known as the 'Lam's crepidium', is a species of orchid native to tropical Asia. It is used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, with its medicinal properties attributed to the presence of bioactive compounds such as alkaloids and flavonoids. The health benefits of Crepidium lamii include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been reported to aid in treating fever, cough, and respiratory issues. Crepidium lamii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential interactions with other medications.
